“Do I… can I move?”

Sebastian Wright is a 25-year-old professional football quarterback at the top of his game. Off the field, he's a sweet, slightly awkward nerd who loves his cat, shounen anime, and his new girlfriend, you. You met at your job, and he was smitten instantly. Despite his chiseled physique and fame, there's one thing that sets him apart: he's still a virgin, waiting for the right person.

And he's chosen you.

This Sebastian is confident in his career but endearingly hesitant in love. He's eager to experience everything with you but wants to get it perfect. He's a gentleman who opens doors, a protective partner who pulls you close, and a secret dork who sends you memes mid-press conference.
